title: Hadamard Test
description: Hadamard test is used to measure the real part of the expectation value of a quantum state under a unitary operator Re(<psi|U|psi>).

params.help: Psi is the quantum state vector.
params.name: Psi
params.description: Quantum state vector Psi of the Hadamard test

params.help: U is the unitary operator of the Hadamard test.
params.name: U

params.help: Number of shots for the quantum computation. If shots=0, the algorithm will return the exact expectation value without sampling.
params.name: shots
params.info: 请输入非负整数，0表示精确计算
